statBand.heading: A track record measured in decades and megaprojects

whoWeAre.heading: A single authority across the infrastructure lifecycle
whoWeAre.body: SATCO is a Saudi-owned infrastructure and services group operating across construction, airport infrastructure, operations and support services, as well as public–private partnerships (PPP). Established in 1975, SATCO supports complex projects that require scale, reliability, and long-term commitment.

careersTeaser.heading: Build a career on projects that matter
careersTeaser.body: SATCO offers opportunities to work on complex, large-scale projects that support national development and long-term infrastructure performance. Our teams operate across diverse environments, delivering projects that demand technical excellence and operational discipline.

contactTeaser.heading: Connect with SATCO to discuss partnerships, opportunities, or general inquiries.
